Buyer FAQ.

Quick answers before you enquire.

How is RM1,820/month calculated?

It is an estimated instalment for a selected Type A package and depends on loan approval, financing terms, selected package and chosen unit.

Is zero downpayment available to everyone?

Package eligibility is subject to the latest campaign terms, financing approval and developer confirmation.

Which units have sea views?

Selected stacks offer sea, city, garden, mountain or Southbay Plaza views. Request the latest view-direction and available-stack list.

Is the project freehold?

Yes. The sales material positions M Amaya as a freehold service apartment development in Batu Maung, Penang.

What is included in the furnishing package?

Partially furnished options may be available under selected packages. Final inclusions should be checked against the latest official package.

When is completion and maintenance?

The sales kit states expected completion in 2030 and maintenance at RM0.33 psf inclusive of sinking fund, subject to latest official confirmation.

Can I check loan eligibility before viewing?

Yes. Basic eligibility checking can be arranged before a showroom appointment, subject to the required financial information and bank assessment.

M Amaya @ Southbay City, Batu Maung, Penang

Project information, pricing, packages, layouts, facilities, view direction, and availability are subject to change. Please confirm with the latest official sales material.
